description: AI model-specific attack patterns: model inversion, membership inference, adversarial inputs

patterns.name: Model Inversion Probe
patterns.description: Repeated queries designed to reconstruct training data from model outputs
indicators: show me examples from your training
what data were you trained on

patterns.name: Membership Inference Attack
patterns.description: Queries probing whether specific data was in training set

patterns.name: Adversarial Prompt
patterns.description: Unicode homoglyphs, zero-width characters, or invisible text in prompts
patterns.detection: presence of zero-width or direction-override characters in prompt

patterns.name: Token Budget Exhaustion
patterns.description: Deliberately long inputs designed to exhaust context window and bypass safety checks

patterns.name: Gradient-Based Adversarial Suffix
patterns.description: Adversarial suffix appended to bypass safety alignment

patterns.name: System Prompt Extraction
patterns.description: Attempts to extract the system prompt or internal instructions
